tools.name: read_file
tools.description: Read the contents of a file. Returns the full file content as text.

path.description: File path relative to repo root

tools.name: write_file
tools.description: Write content to a file. Creates parent directories if needed.

path.description: File path relative to repo root

tools.name: list_directory
tools.description: List files and subdirectories at a path. Returns names with type indicators (file/dir).

path.description: Directory path relative to repo root (default: '.')

recursive.description: List recursively up to depth 3 (default: false)

tools.name: search_code
tools.description: Search for a regex pattern in files. Returns matching lines with file paths and line numbers.

path.description: Directory to search in (default: repo root)

tools.name: get_file_tree
tools.description: Get the full file tree of the repository as indented text. Respects .gitignore.
